home.title: Trackerino
home.subtitle: Search any summoner to view their stats
home.noFavorites: Star a summoner to add them here
home.noRecent: Your recent searches will appear here

patchNotes.title: Patch Notes
patchNotes.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest changes

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.teemo: Even Teemo couldn't find this page...

footer.disclaimer: Trackerino isn't endorsed by Riot Games and doesn't reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Riot Games properties. Riot Games, and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience. Some cookies are essential for the site to function, while others help us understand usage and improve our services.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it.
cookies.preferencesDesc: Remember your settings such as language and theme.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDesc: Choose how Trackerino looks for you.
settings.defaultRegionDesc: Select the default region used when searching for summoners.
settings.cookieStatusDesc: Current status of your cookie preferences.
settings.resetCookiesDesc: This will delete your cookie preferences and show the consent banner again.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Remove all saved search history from this browser.
settings.clearFavoritesDesc: Remove all saved favorites from this browser.
settings.exportFavoritesDesc: Download your favorites as a JSON file for backup.
settings.importFavoritesDesc: Restore favorites from a previously exported JSON file.
settings.importError: Failed to import favorites. Please check the file format.
settings.techStackDesc: Next.js 14, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Riot Games API
settings.builtWith: Built with care for the League of Legends community.
